parameter: Colour and Appearance of Resin Pellets
method: Visual inspection — compare against approved reference sample; check for discolouration, contamination, fines
specification: Natural/white pellets, free from black specks, yellowing, foreign material, excessive fines

method: Check supplier COA for grade, lot number, test results, date, authorised signature; verify against Purchase Order
specification: COA must be present, signed, and all parameters within approved limits; lot number must match delivery

parameter: Lot Traceability — Bag Labelling and Quantity
method: Check each bag/jumbo bag for supplier label, grade, lot no., manufacturing date, net weight; tally against delivery note
specification: All bags correctly labelled; net weight within ±[TO BE ENTERED]% of declared weight; quantity matches delivery note

parameter: Visual Inspection — Flash, Sink Marks, Warpage, Surface Defects
method: Visual 100% inspection under adequate lighting; reject parts with flash at parting line, sink marks, warpage, black specks, or short shots
specification: No flash exceeding [TO BE ENTERED] mm; no sink marks; no warpage visible to naked eye; no black specks; no short shots

specification: No air leakage from body, seam, or neck; pressure must hold for [TO BE ENTERED] seconds without drop

method: Measure overall height and max outer diameter using Vernier Caliper

parameter: Visual Appearance — Body, Neck, Flash, Colour
method: 100% visual inspection under adequate lighting; check for flash, warpage, black specks, colour variation, surface scratches, sink marks
specification: No flash, no visible warpage, no black specks, colour matches approved shade, no surface scratches, no sink marks

method: Verify label placement, print legibility, batch/date code correctness, no label misalignment or peeling
